code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut tok = ""
  mut total = 0
  while i <= n
    mut b = 0
    if i == n
      b = 32
    else
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(v)
        b = v
      when None
        b = 32
      end
    end
    if is_ws(b)
      if not string.is_empty(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          if v % 2 == 0
            total = total + v
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        tok = ""
      end
    else
      tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("sum_even=#{total}")
end
